title: cassia auricoma
intro: Cassia auricoma, also known as Cassia alata, is a tropical plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cassia auricoma include its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, as well as its potential in managing diabetes and reducing cholesterol levels. Cassia auricoma is often prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or topical cream, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
